title: Resolution Granting the Collective Negotiation Agreement (CNA) Incentive for Fy 2021 in the Amount of Twenty -five Thousand Pesos (P 25,000.00) to All Members and Management of Association of Municipal Employees of Los Baños - Laguna (AMELBA - UNA). (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 02/08/2022)
